title: Legacy era
content:
{{Top|real|leg}}
[[File:Era-leg.png|right|The symbol designating the Legacy era]]
The '''Legacy era''' takes place between and after [[37 ABY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> and [[140 ABY]].
Major events happened in this era, such as [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]'s fall to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and transformation into Darth Caedus, as well as the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] and the [[Sith–Imperial War]]. In the hole between the [[Star Wars: Fate of the Jedi|''Fate of the Jedi'']] book series and the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' comics, there are multiple unseen events, such as the growth of the [[New Jedi Order]], and the ultimate fates of characters such as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Ben Skywalker]], [[Jaina Solo Fel]], [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana Solo]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and others.
